name: io.github.cmendezs/mcp-nfe-br
description: MCP server for Brazilian e-invoicing: NF-e and NFC-e (modelo 55/65), schema 4.00, SEFAZ.

environmentVariables.name: BR_READ_ONLY
environmentVariables.description: Set to '1' to disable write-side SEFAZ tools (br__submit_nfe, br__distribute_dfe). Read-only mode for safe exploration.

environmentVariables.name: LOG_LEVEL
environmentVariables.description: Logging level: DEBUG, INFO (default), WARNING, or ERROR
